old_value: {"id":"broadside-to5p.6","title":"Feed poller dedup breaks on non-chronological feeds","description":"feed.rs processes entries in reverse order and breaks when it hits last_seen_id. This assumes entries are in chronological order, which RSS/Atom specs don't guarantee. Should instead skip any entry whose id matches a previously-seen source_ref in the posts table, not break on first match.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"mark@reviewcommit.com","created_at":"2026-07-17T23:08:25.949265992Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T23:08:25.949265992Z","labels":["hardening"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"broadside-to5p.6","depends_on_id":"broadside-to5p","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T23:08:25.962377518Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
